zone_name: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

2199.name: Among the Black Trees
2199.description: Tainted with death, the trees of this forest encase themselves in bark of deepest black. They rise high above you and link together to close out the sky and finish the darkness. The undergrowth seems nevertheless to thrive beneath them, and the pale thorns rip and tear at you as you pass between the trunks. The trees close too tightly together to make your way east, but you can walk north, south, or west.

n.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

2200.name: Beneath the Canopy
2200.description: Each tree in this area by the river boasts a ring of scraggly brush around the base of its black trunk. From these thorny plants rise thin yellow vines that spiral slowly upward around the trees. From above hang creeper tendrils vying for the forest floor from which sprout the heads of hundreds of pale fungi. Only the east provides a viable route through the woods.

e.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

n.to_zone: The Dark Forest - Brown River Valley

3513.name: Stunted Growth
3513.description: All around you, columns of midnight black rise majestically into the dark heavens, branching high above to form the dome of the sky. Pale, withered shrubs share the ground between the columns with numerous fungi. The few scattered stones drown in seas of moss and lichen, and the air hangs heavy with moisture. Just to the north is the river.

s.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

3514.name: Among the Black Trees
3514.description: The black trunks grow side by side here, blocking your path to the north and west. The ground is covered with a litter of dead leaves through which rise the pointed red heads of wild mushrooms. A foul odor drifts from somewhere nearby, making you slightly nauseous. You can travel east or south.

e.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

s.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

3515.name: Among the Black Trees
3515.description: From the hillside to the south juts a wide, low outcropping of reddish stone. The black trees grow widely spaced, planting their roots through wide cracks in the stone, but the brush clings more tenaciously and covers much of the stone, growing to be quite large. Paths run north and west into the forest.

w.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

go into.to_zone: Den of the Wolf Lords - The Dark Forest

3517.name: Among the Black Trees
3517.description: Never before have you seen bark of such pure blackness as covers the trees that now surround you. You peel a bit back, but even the flesh of the trunk beneath carries the somber hue. The hill slopes downward from south to north, and the way is open in either direction. From the west, a sickening stench slithers into your nostrils.

w.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

3518.name: Malodorous Hillside
3518.description: The noxious odor that assaults you as you arrive at this narrow break in the trees nearly brings you to your knees. As you scan the huge mound of offal that fills the area between the trees, you grasp desperately for a blackened trunk to hold you steady. Surrounded by the impenetrable black forest, you stand high on a hill overlooking a clearing set before a large cave. A path leads north into the clearing, where a dragon rests, guarding the cave against intruders.

n.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

3519.name: Lair of the Dragon
3519.description: Though they still close high overhead and strangle any stray light, the trees break here around a wide clearing. The ground in the clearing is free of the pale undergrowth characteristic of this part of the forest, and those few plants surrounding the clearing look closer to the edge of death than is usual. Beside the clearing, the maw of a cave gapes widely in the hillside, beckoning you to your doom.

e.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest

w.to_zone: Silver Lake Caverns - The Dark Forest
